user_prompt: Pull all senior data engineer postings on Greenhouse this week and rank them by match score.
actual_output:
### Greenhouse Senior Data Engineer Scan — This Week

**Search parameters:** Posted within last 7 days · Senior Data Engineer (and equivalents: Staff DE, Sr. Data Platform Engineer, Lead DE)

Before I run the scan, I need your profile parameters to calculate match scores. Please confirm:

| Parameter | Need From You |
|-----------|---------------|
| Years of experience | ? |
| Core stack | (e.g., Python, Spark, Airflow, dbt, Snowflake) |
| Cloud platforms | (AWS / GCP / Azure) |
| Streaming experience | (Kafka, Flink, Kinesis?) |
| Domain background | (fintech, healthtech, e-commerce, etc.) |
| Location preference | (city, remote, hybrid) |
| Minimum salary | ? |
| Company stage preference | (seed/Series B/late-stage/public) |

### Match Score Methodology

Once I have your profile, each listing gets scored 0–100 across:

| Dimension | Weight |
|-----------|--------|
| Stack alignment | 30% |
| Experience level fit | 20% |
| Domain relevance | 15% |
| Salary match | 15% |
| Location/work model | 10% |
| Company stage fit | 10% |

### Preview — What the Output Will Look Like

| Rank | Company | Role | Match | Salary | Location | Key Signal |
|------|---------|------|-------|--------|----------|------------|
| 1 | [Company] | Sr. Data Engineer | 94 | $180–220K | Remote (US) | Stack overlap 8/9 |
| 2 | [Company] | Staff DE, Platform | 89 | $200–240K | NYC hybrid | Domain match + Spark |
| 3 | [Company] | Sr. DE, Analytics | 86 | $170–200K | Remote | dbt + Snowflake core |
| ... | | | | | | |

### Tier Breakdown You'll Get
- **Tier 1 (90+):** Apply tonight, full customization
- **Tier 2 (75–89):** Apply within 48 hrs, targeted customization
- **Tier 3 (60–74):** Optional stretch applications
- **Below 60:** Filtered out unless you override

Send me your profile parameters and I'll return the ranked list within the hour. If you have a resume on file from a prior campaign, just say "use existing profile" and I'll pull it.
judge_reasoning: The chatbot proactively engaged with the request by explaining its methodology and asking for the necessary user data to provide an accurate, high-quality ranked list as requested.
